title: A checkbox grid for reporting days of the week and timeframes for each separate day (Sun-Sat & Morning, Afternoon, Evening)
excerpt: I’m trying to make a volunteer availability form where volunteers can indicate their availability for both day(s) of the week and time(s) of day for each day. An example can be seen in the picture.

posts.author: eperkinscrcc (E. Perkins)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to make a volunteer availability form where volunteers can indicate their availability for both day(s) of the week and time(s) of day for each day. An example can be seen in the picture.
